title: Computer scientists are rushing to tame AI's voracious appetite for energy
summary: Scientists are exploring new algorithms, hardware and computing methods to lower AI's power demands. Strategic siting of data centers and other steps to increase green energy use are also key.
author: Katarina Zimmer

title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
summary: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.

title: Claude Design 2.0 Just Changed Everything...
summary: 🔥 Firecrawl: https://bit.ly/4aHCD8A 📈 ALL Systems: https://bit.ly/4kol0y5 🎙️ Glaido: https://bit.ly/4eGoI3R Claude Design 2.0 just dropped, and the credits actually go further now, which was the biggest reason people steered clear. In this one I walk through five levels of using it, from building slides and animations in your own brand to pulling brand identities straight off a website with Firecrawl. We also push designs back into Claude Code, handle the export to PowerPoint and PDF, and look at running it all locally with Open Design so you're never locked into one model. There's a proper limitation to be aware of with the handover, so I show you the zip workaround that genuinely fixes it. By the end you'll know how to own the whole stack and keep building even when you hit your limits. *Core Software* 🩵 Free Resources: https://bit.ly/3RNNDLa 🔥 Glaido: https://bit.ly/4eGoI3R ☁️ Claude: https://claude.ai/ 🔥 Firecrawl: https://firecrawl.dev/ 📁 GitHub: https://github.com/ 💬 ChatGPT: https://chatgpt.com/ ⌚️ Stamps: 00:00 - Claude Design 2.0 Explained 00:33 - The Five Levels 00:46 - What Claude Design Actually Is 01:07 - Four Big Changes 01:32 - Level One: The Interface 02:41 - Level Two: Building Together 02:58 - Slides From A GitHub Repo 04:42 - Editing Right On The Canvas 06:11 - Using Your Built In Connectors 06:58 - Firecrawl For Brand Identity 08:18 - Design Versus Claude Code 09:16 - Level Four: Back To Code 10:45 - The Zip Handover Fix 11:40 - Level Five: Own The Stack 12:02 - Running Open Design Locally 13:17 - Picking Any Model 14:24 - GLM At One Sixth The Cost 14:38 - Where To Go From Here How to use Claude Design 2.0 to build slides, websites and animations in your own brand, scrape brand identity with Firecrawl, hand designs over to Claude Code, export to PowerPoint, and run it all locally with Open Design and Codex. #ClaudeDesign #ClaudeCode #Firecrawl #AIDesign #OpenDesign #AIWorkflow
author: Jack Roberts
